# Monsieur Click

> Local SEO & GEO agency near Paris, France. We make small businesses easy to find, recommend and choose, on Google and in AI (ChatGPT, Gemini, Claude, Perplexity), through the all-in-one Click First method.

## Core pages
- [Click First method](https://monsieurclick.com/click-first.html): the all-in-one SEO + AI visibility system.
- [Pricing](https://monsieurclick.com/offres.html): Essential, Growth, Expansion plans (from EUR 850/month).
- [Case studies](https://monsieurclick.com/realisations.html): real client results.
- [About](https://monsieurclick.com/a-propos.html): who we are.
- [Free audit](https://monsieurclick.com/contact.html): book a 30-minute audit.
- [Blog](https://monsieurclick.com/blog.html): local SEO, Google Business Profile and AI visibility.
